advancements.bakeries.cheese_power.title: Cheese Power!
advancements.bakeries.get_flat_croissant: Make flat croissants using a falling anvil.
advancements.bakeries.get_sofa.title: Come on, sit down
advancements.bakeries.get_taro.title: Meetion
advancements.bakeries.glossy_green.descr: Get a bottle of olive oil.
advancements.bakeries.glossy_green.title: Glossy Green
advancements.bakeries.immortalers_the_ba: Take Sniffer and dig up coffee beans in the jungle biome.
advancements.bakeries.it.s.bread.descr: I've eaten ten different kinds of bread!
advancements.bakeries.it.s.bread.title: It s Bread
advancements.bakeries.mix_well.title: Mix Well
advancements.bakeries.natural_activity.d: Use the bottle to scoop out the natural yeast from the fermenter.
advancements.bakeries.perfect_temperatur: With a more precise temperature, the food will be more delicious.
advancements.bakeries.root.title: Bakery
advancements.bakeries.rough_flavor.descr: Wheat is used to make whole wheat flour.
advancements.bakeries.rough_flavor.title: Rough Flavor
advancements.bakeries.sieving.title: Sieving
advancements.bakeries.very_hard.title: It can't be eaten. It can't be eaten at all
bakeries.book.name: Baking Guide
container.bakeries.oven.rolling: Scroll the middle mouse to adjust the temperature.
effect.bakeries.cocoa_mania.description: Ignore the damage caused by the entity's invincible time.
effect.bakeries.enjoy.description: When you have this effect, you will be immune to all negative effects and increase the speed of blood recovery.
effect.bakeries.soft.description: Increase armor value and repel resistance, and bombard the attacker entity.
guide.bakeries.descr.await: In the real world, making bread often requires long periods of fermentation or hydrolysis.
guide.bakeries.descr.baked_bread: Do you have an oven?  With the oven you can bake the bread, the bottom of the bread object shows the oven temperature required for the bread, adjust the oven temperature to the right temperature, put the bread in the bread, wait for the delicious bread.
guide.bakeries.descr.be_unable_to_eat_an: In the development version, the baguette can be Enchanting Mending.Perhaps you could try attaching durability(?
guide.bakeries.descr.blender: The blender is a very important machine for you to go on the baking road. It can mix and make many things, such as dough and batter.
guide.bakeries.descr.blender_2: You can use the Redstone torch to adjust the machine to compatibility mode, where you can set item filtering.
guide.bakeries.descr.bread_knife: You can use it to cut bread, like country bread.
guide.bakeries.descr.bread_making_proces: A nanny-level tutorial on bread making
guide.bakeries.descr.cake_making_process: A nanny-level tutorial on cake making
guide.bakeries.descr.cake_roll: $(l:https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1WcuAzQEMr)Nanny level tutorial on making cake rolls
guide.bakeries.descr.cheese: You first need to prepare a fermenter, put a bucket of milk and a serving of $(l:food_ingredient/salt)salt/$ in it, and let the fermentation finish, you can pick out the cheese cubes with your hands.
guide.bakeries.descr.cocoa_powder: Use$(l:baking_utensil/flour_sieve)Flour Sieve/$The cocoa beans are sifted into cocoa powder.
guide.bakeries.descr.create_bread_dough: Put the kneaded dough into the $(gold)dough synthesis table/$ again, you can view the dough can be made bread embryo, left click to select to synthesize.
guide.bakeries.descr.feed_sequence: The order of ingredients for the dough synthesis recipe is very close to the real order of ingredients, dry powder > yeast > liquid > butter.
guide.bakeries.descr.flour: Use a $(l:baking_utensil/flour_sieve)flour sieve/$ to sift the whole wheat flour into flour.
guide.bakeries.descr.flour_sieve: Flour Sieve for sifting items, such as $(l:food_ingredient/flour)flour/$.
guide.bakeries.descr.fresh_cheese_cube: You can get four servings of fresh cheese cubes by putting one portion of milk and one portion of salt in the fermentation tank.
guide.bakeries.descr.matcha_powder: Use$(l:baking_utensil/flour_sieve)Flour Sieve/$Sift the leaves into matcha powder.
guide.bakeries.descr.meat_floss: Process Cooked Porkchop into Meat Floss using a $(l:baking_utensil/blander) blender/$.
guide.bakeries.descr.milk: Hold the bottle milk in your hand, right-click and shake it, and its texture will change after a while.
guide.bakeries.descr.moka_pot: You can use a mocha pot to brew coffee.
guide.bakeries.descr.moka_pot_2: Place the mocha pot above the stove, right-click to add the coffee powder, and the coffee will be cooked in a short while.
guide.bakeries.descr.mould: Make some foods with special shapes, you may need to use them.
guide.bakeries.descr.olive: It can be obtained through transactions with villagers in the farming profession.
guide.bakeries.descr.perfect_temperature: Food with a Perfect Temperature entry can be eaten even when you are not hungry
guide.bakeries.descr.prepare_the_dough: With $(l:yeast_making) yeast/$, you are ready to start making the dough, of course, you need a $(l:baking_utensil/blander) mixer/$to make the dough.
guide.bakeries.descr.prepare_the_paste: You need to use$(l:baking_utensil/blander)Blander/$To make the cake batter, first make the whipped egg whites and egg yolk batter separately, and then mix them together.
guide.bakeries.descr.raw_coffee_bean: Sniffer beasts can dig up raw coffee beans in the jungle biomes.
guide.bakeries.descr.salt: You can use salt water to get kosher salt blocks
guide.bakeries.descr.sequence_assembly: You can manually place the ingredients on the cake base to make a more upscale cake!
guide.bakeries.descr.sequence_assembly_2: Cut Cake Base→Foamed Cream→Cut Cake Base→Foamed Cream→Sweet Berries
guide.bakeries.descr.sequence_assembly_3: Soak Coffee Cut Cake Base→Cheese Cream→Soak Coffee Cut Cake Base→Cheese Cream→Cocoa Powder
guide.bakeries.descr.star_baking: Pour the cake batter into the mold. Baking a cake always requires a mold, although the molds they need may be different. Anyway, once it's ready, put it in the oven to bake.
guide.bakeries.descr.stone_kiln: A very primitive oven. You can use it to bake pizza. You also need a Stone Kiln Shovel for putting in and taking out items.
guide.bakeries.descr.taro: It can be obtained through transactions with villagers in the farming profession.
guide.bakeries.descr.tomato: It can be obtained through transactions with villagers in the farming profession.
guide.bakeries.descr.whole_egg: It can be obtained by right-clicking the main hand with an egg and the secondary hand with a bread knife.
guide.bakeries.descr.yeast_making: To make bread, you first need to make dough, and to make dough you of course need $(gold)yeast/$, you first need a fermenter,Put in $(gold)3 parts $(l:food_ingredient/flour)whole wheat flour/$$(gold) and 1 part water/$, and let it rise, then you can remove the fresh yeast in a mason jar.
guide.bakeries.entries.be_unable_to_eat_: Be Unable to Eat Any More
guide.bakeries.entries.moka_pot: Brew coffee in a mocha pot
tooltips.bakeries.bread_knife: When using  cut the object pointed by the target.
tooltips.bakeries.drink: The Enjoy effect can be enhanced to a %s
tooltips.bakeries.eternal_baguette: Impose a forced knock back and slow effect on Entity
tooltips.bakeries.flour_sieve_0: Sift the item in the main hand while holding it off hand
tooltips.bakeries.flour_sieve_3: I don't have the power, you know?
tooltips.bakeries.mould: When the secondary weapon has a Knife long-pressing the right button can disengage it
tooltips.bakeries.player_logged_in: §6[Bakeries]§fInstall Patchouli to obtain the mod tutorial book
tooltips.bakeries.toaster_0: Right-click with your left hand to start baking
tooltips.bakeries.toaster_1: %s and right-click to retrieve the item
